short_description: Uncover vulnerabilities in your code for just $0.01 per call!
long_description: With security_mcp, developers can easily identify vulnerabilities in their applications using the OSV.dev database. Whether you're working with npm, PyPI, or Go, our open-source vulnerability lookup tool streamlines the security assessment process. Perfect for security analysts and developers alike, this service empowers teams to maintain robust security hygiene without breaking the bank. Plus, start with a free health check to ensure everything's running smoothly.
seo_description: Discover vulnerabilities in your code for just $0.01 per call. Free health check available!
marketplace_review: Security_mcp offers a reliable and cost-effective way to discover vulnerabilities in your code. The API is user-friendly and integrates seamlessly into existing workflows. Ideal for developers who prioritize security without overspending.
awesome_one_liner: Discover vulnerabilities effortlessly for just $0.01 per call!
